description_long: This object represents an adult pedestrian with a slender, upright human form. The figure appears to be standing with arms relaxed at the sides and legs straight, suggesting a neutral, stationary posture. The silhouette is smooth and lacks detailed facial or anatomical features, giving it a minimalist and abstract appearance. There are no visible accessories, carried items, or distinguishing marks on the body. The surface appears uniform and untextured, with no visible seams or clothing details. The overall proportions and stance are consistent with a typical adult human in an urban environment.
description: A minimalist, upright adult pedestrian figure with a smooth, featureless surface and neutral standing posture.
description_view_0: The figure is seen from the side, showing a thin profile with arms and legs aligned vertically.
description_view_1: A front or rear view, displaying the narrow width of the body and the arms close to the torso.
description_view_2: Another side profile, similar to view 0, emphasizing the slenderness and upright stance.
description_view_3: A front or rear view, mirroring view 1, with the body appearing as a thin vertical line.
